en: My little children, I am writing these things to you so that you may not sin. But if anyone does sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous.
zh: 我的孩子們，我寫這些給你們，是要你們不犯罪。如果有人犯了罪，在父的面前我們有一位維護者，就是那義者耶穌基督。

en: He is the propitiation for our sins, and not for ours only but also for the sins of the whole world.
zh: 他為我們的罪作了贖罪祭，不僅為我們的罪，也為全人類的罪。

en: And by this we know that we have come to know him, if we keep his commandments.
zh: 我們若遵守 神的命令，這樣，就知道我們已經認識他。

en: Whoever says "I know him" but does not keep his commandments is a liar, and the truth is not in him,
zh: 凡是說“我已經認識他”，卻不遵守他命令的，就是說謊的人，真理就不在他裡面了。

en: but whoever keeps his word, in him truly the love of God is perfected. By this we may be sure that we are in him:
zh: 然而凡是遵守他的道的，他愛 神的心就的確在他裡面完全了。這樣，我們就知道我們是在 神裡面了。

en: whoever says he abides in him ought to walk in the same way in which he walked.
zh: 凡說自己是住在他裡面的，就應該照著他所行的去行。

en: Beloved, I am writing you no new commandment, but an old commandment that you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word that you have heard.
zh: 親愛的，我寫給你們的，不是一條新命令，而是你們本來就有的舊命令。這舊命令就是你們聽過的道。

en: At the same time, it is a new commandment that I am writing to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light is already shining.
zh: 然而，因為黑暗漸漸消逝，真光已在照耀，我寫給你們的也是一條新命令，這在 神和在你們來說，都是真的。

en: Whoever says he is in the light and hates his brother is still in darkness.
zh: 凡是說自己在光明中，卻恨他的弟兄的，他到現在還在黑暗裡。

en: Whoever loves his brother abides in the light, and in him there is no cause for stumbling.
zh: 凡是愛弟兄的，就是住在光明中，在光明中他就不會跌倒。

en: But whoever hates his brother is in the darkness and walks in the darkness, and does not know where he is going, because the darkness has blinded his eyes.
zh: 凡是恨弟兄的，就是在黑暗裡，也在黑暗裡行事。他不知道往哪裡去，因為黑暗弄瞎了他的眼睛。

en: I am writing to you, little children, because your sins are forgiven for his name's sake.
zh: 孩子們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們的罪因著主的名已經得到赦免。

en: I am writing to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I am writing to you, young men, because you have overcome the evil one. I write to you, children, because you know the Father.
zh: 父老們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們認識太初就存在的那一位。 青年們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們已經勝過那惡者。

en: I write to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I write to you, young men, because you are strong, and the word of God abides in you, and you have overcome the evil one.
zh: 孩子們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們認識父。 父老們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們認識太初就存在的那一位。 青年們，我寫信給你們， 因為你們強壯， 神的道在你們心裡， 你們也勝過了那惡者。

en: Do not love the world or the things in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in him.
zh: 不要愛世界和世上的東西。人若愛世界，愛父的心就不在他裡面了。

en: For all that is in the world- the desires of the flesh and the desires of the eyes and pride in possessions- is not from the Father but is from the world.
zh: 原來世上的一切，就如肉體的私慾，眼目的私慾和今生的驕傲，都不是出於父，而是從世界來的。

en: And the world is passing away along with its desires, but whoever does the will of God abides forever.
zh: 這世界和世上的私慾都要漸漸過去，但那遵行 神旨意的卻存到永遠。

en: Children, it is the last hour, and as you have heard that antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have come. Therefore we know that it is the last hour.
zh: 孩子們，現在是末世的時候了。你們聽過敵基督者要來，現在已經有不少敵基督起來了；因此我們就知道這是末世的時候了。

en: They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would have continued with us. But they went out, that it might become plain that they all are not of us.
zh: 他們從我們中間離去，這就表明他們是不屬於我們的。其實他們並不屬於我們，如果真的屬於我們，就一定會留在我們中間。

en: But you have been anointed by the Holy One, and you all have knowledge.
zh: 你們從那聖者得著膏抹，這是你們都知道的。

en: I write to you, not because you do not know the truth, but because you know it, and because no lie is of the truth.
zh: 我寫信給你們，不是因為你們不明白真理，而是因為你們明白，又因為謊言絕不會出於真理的。

en: Who is the liar but he who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This is the antichrist, he who denies the Father and the Son.
zh: 那麼，誰是說謊的呢？不就是那否認耶穌是基督的嗎？否認父和子的，他就是敵基督的。

en: No one who denies the Son has the Father. Whoever confesses the Son has the Father also.
zh: 凡否認子的，就沒有父；承認子的，連父也有了。

en: Let what you heard from the beginning abide in you. If what you heard from the beginning abides in you, then you too will abide in the Son and in the Father.
zh: 至於你們，總要把起初所聽見的存記在你們心裡；你們若把起初所聽見的存記在心裡，你們也就住在子和父裡面了。

en: And this is the promise that he made to us- eternal life.
zh: 他應許給我們的，就是永遠的生命。

en: I write these things to you about those who are trying to deceive you.
zh: 我把這些事寫給你們，是指著那些欺騙你們的人說的。

en: But the anointing that you received from him abides in you, and you have no need that anyone should teach you. But as his anointing teaches you about everything- and is true and is no lie, just as it has taught you- abide in him.
zh: 你們既然在你們裡面有從主領受的膏抹，就不需要別人教導你們了，因為在一切事上有主的膏抹教導你們；這膏抹是真的，不是假的，你們應該按著他所教導的住在他裡面。

en: And now, little children, abide in him, so that when he appears we may have confidence and not shrink from him in shame at his coming.
zh: 孩子們，你們要住在主裡面。這樣，他若顯現，我們就可以坦然無懼；他來的時候，我們也不至慚愧地躲避他了。

en: If you know that he is righteous, you may be sure that everyone who practices righteousness has been born of him.
zh: 你們既然曉得 神是公義的，就應當知道所有行公義的都是從他生的。
